parties.name: RESNICK, SHELLY JAY 890 HAYES STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94117

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF GENDER
Off Calendar May-27-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Gender and issuance of new Birth Certificate.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Shelly Jay Resnick was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Declaration of Doctor James Coen in support of petitioner's Order to Show Cause for Change of Gender and Issuance of a New Birth Certificate filed today, May 27, 2008.

No objections to the proposed change were made at the hearing. It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Gender from Male to Female, and issuance of New Birth Certificate.

Order for Change of Gender and Issuance of New Birth Certificate.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF GENDER
Off Calendar May-13-2008 Reset To May-27-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Hearing on Petition for Change of Gender and Issuance of a New Birth Certificate.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire,, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, Bailiff: L. Thomas.

Petitioner Shelly Jay Resnick was present in pro per, but did present the Court with a declaration from her treating physcian, as required by code.

Good cause appearing, the Re-Notice of Hearing on Petitioner for Change of Gender and Issuance of a New Birth Certificate was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is contineud to May 27, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.
